expectations.evidence: Article 7:652 BW — Proeftijd (Probation Period) — the section header and throughout: 'Article 7:652 BW governs the probation period in Dutch employment contracts.'
Fixed-term contracts of more than 6 months: Maximum probation period of één maand (one month). Indefinite-term (permanent) contracts: Maximum probation period of twee maanden (two months).
The probation period MUST be agreed in writing (schriftelijk). An oral probation agreement is null and void (nietig). This is an absolute requirement.
This is an AI-generated legal analysis and does NOT constitute legal advice within the meaning of the Dutch Advocates Act (Advocatenwet).
